data.body: Kickoff. Worktree ../reb-687 on feat/llm-failure-handling from origin/main b76dd09a1. Local venv built. SPIKE (arcticduck transport injection) PASSED: AsyncTenacityTransport forwarded through AnthropicProvider->AnthropicModel; 429(+Retry-After)->200 retries below SDK (max_retries=0) under run_sync on BOTH normal+loopback paths. Critical go/no-go = GO.
